utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 required items in the format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Checking the final property solution: all six items are present. Each one is fully specified with appropriate details. 'property' includes description, location, price, and features. 'financing' includes loan amount, rate, term, payments, lender, and other financial details. 'legal_services' includes scope, cost, and timeline. 'moving_services' includes scope, cost, and timeline. 'setup_services' includes insurance, cost, setup fee, and list of utilities. 'total_budget' includes price, fees, total, and monthly breakdown. All items are complete and detailed.
